overall.description: Static shots of a medieval fantasy house interior from a video game, first showing a living area with a stone fireplace and an NPC, then cutting to a candlelit bedroom. The footage features warm artificial lighting from fire and candles with no camera movement.

open wooden door frame leading to another room
simple wooden table against the right wall
taxidermy deer head mounted above the fireplace

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval living room with a stone fireplace as the central focus. An NPC stands near the fireplace on the left while warm firelight illuminates the wooden interior. The camera remains fixed, capturing the rustic stone and wood architecture.

agents.ego_description: static camera observing the furnished bedroom interior

entered.detail: wooden bed frame with green bedspread
tall wooden cabinet against the left wall
tall stand with multiple lit candles providing warm light
wooden writing desk with items on top
wooden chair positioned at the desk
ornate circular rug covering the wooden floor
wall hanging tapestry depicting a figure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a candlelit bedroom featuring a wooden bed with green covers, a wardrobe, and a desk. Multiple candles provide the only illumination, casting warm light on the stone walls and wooden ceiling beams. The room is empty of people and the camera remains static throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a cozy, inhabited medieval living area into the quiet solitude of a candlelit bedroom. It begins with a view of a rustic living room centered around a stone fireplace, where warm firelight illuminates the wooden architecture and a nearby NPC. As the perspective shifts, the glow of the hearth gives way to the flickering light of multiple candles within a private sleeping chamber. The scene then opens to reveal a wooden bed with green covers, a wardrobe, and a desk set against stone walls and heavy ceiling beams. Finally, the atmosphere settles into a still, empty space defined by the soft, warm illumination of the candlelight.
